== Notes for [[Item:Q58081|Q58081]] ==

==links==
* https://www.findagrave.com/memorial/157580834/hans-henrich-frey

=== GEDCOM Note ===
=== 1587 ===
1587

=== GEDCOM Note ===
=== (1578) ===
(1578)

=== GEDCOM Note ===
=== Life Sketch ===

--------------------
=== GEDCOM Note ===
GEDCOM data

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
